inputs.titre: Bataille de la Boyne en Irlande, soutenue par Louis XIV

reason: The image depicts a battle scene with soldiers in 17th-century clothing, including breeches, coats, and hats. They are using muskets and swords. The setting appears to be a muddy battlefield, fitting the description of the Battle of the Boyne. There are no obvious anachronisms like modern technology or fantastical elements. However, the uniformity and crispness of the uniforms and equipment across such a large number of soldiers raises questions. The level of color saturation, particularly in the red coats, is also potentially an issue as dyes were not as vibrant back then. Overall though, it seems plausible but potentially idealized.
